name: P5M Project Management
description: Developer of fitness application software designed for health and fitness training. The company's application provides various training routines and diet advice for its users, regarding weight loss, weight training, and strength training, enabling customers to access training from certified trainers easily.

name: CyberTalents
description: Developer of an online platform designed to rank cybersecurity professionals based on their technical skills. The company's platform scores and ranks security professionals by running capture-the-flag competitions to help businesses find the talent they're looking for, enabling companies to hire talent from the region through practical assessment.

name: X mart
description: Developer of an online dental marketplace platform designed to sell dental supplies and materials. The company's platform offers a wide variety of dental tools and equipment from trusted vendors and agents, enabling dentists and dental clinic managers to access all dental supplies, equipment, and services online.

name: Gameball
description: Developer of a marketing and customer relationship management platform designed to increase customer retention and improve engagements. The company's platform offers tools that use gamification to offer intelligent, customizable loyalty and rewards programs, behaviour-based notifications, and referral management systems all within a single gamified experience, enabling businesses to retain and grow their customer base by creating personal experiences tailored to their actions and interests.

name: Invygo
description: Developer of a car subscription platform designed to get a car and pay every month and return or upgrade whenever possible without penalties. The company's platform helps users to subscribe and return cars with ease, as well as browse and drive fully insured cars with one payment that includes maintenance, breakdown cover, and concierge assistance, enabling customers to get automobile assistance simply.

name: Octa
description:
Octa provides cutting-edge software and payment technology to B2B companies to bring their cash collection processes to the next level, and improve their cash flows.

Our software manages your Accounts Receivables for you with automated yet personalized workflows and integrates in one click (literally) with your existing accounting software.

Get paid quicker and easier! Reduce your late payments by 50%.
Our features include:

Real-time metrics on your Account Receivable collection
Automated and personalized workflows
Payment portals adapted to each customer

We integrate directly with different accounting solutions like Quickbooks, Netsuite, or Xero and can also develop specific APIs. Our partnerships with Stripe and Go Cardless streamline payments for your customers.

name: Pinoffer
description: Developer of location-based ad and analytics platform designed to increase physical stores sales. The company's platform offers offline store customer retention, growth and churn rates, cashback return on investment, time analysis, enabling offline retailers to understand their customer's in-out of store behavior.

name: Sabbar
description: Developer of a recruitment platform designed to serve the retail and service industries. The company's platform integrates video communications, strategic analytics, and collaborative social technologies into a complete suite of talent management applications, enabling enterprises to boost productivity in managing their candidates and making the right hires.

name: Speero
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to provide automotive spare parts. The company's marketplace covers used and new parts in one single platform with direct integrations with repair shops, insurance companies, and other businesses and also allows users to compare price quotes from suppliers and make an order through the platform or app, enabling users to get automotive parts at low cost and clients to reduce their cost, increase efficiency, eliminate fraud, and discover new opportunities while running their businesses.

name: Taker
description: Developer of an online ordering platform designed to facilitate food ordering and restaurant management. The company's platform leverages technology which is used to expand digitally to adapt to customers' changing behavior and service expectations by seamlessly receiving the orders to prepare for pickup or delivery, enabling restaurants of all sizes to engage better with customers and improve their sales.

name: Telgani
description: Developer of a car rental platform intended to help users rent their desired cars. The company's platform allows users to pick the car and the location they want to travel to and provides options for nearby providers to compare and book car rides, enabling customers to rent cars at competitive prices.

name: Vetwork
description: Operator of an on-demand veterinary services marketplace intended to make pet-care services more accessible, timely, and convenient. The company's application offers pet grooming, deworming, vaccination, medical, and many more pet care services, enabling pet owners to access reliable and affordable pet care services and book them online.

name: Kenz
description: Developer of an online lingerie selling platform designed to provide style and comfort to women residing in the Middle East. The company's platform offers custom fitting innerwear products ranging from bras, vests, pants, sleepwear, pajamas, socks and eye mask, enabling women to have an effortless experience of buying good fitting lingerie.
